message: I'm a seller aiming for repeated, mutually profitable trades. I won’t reveal my cost, but if you share your valuation range we might coordinate on stable prices that keep both of us comfortably in the black.
My valuation is quite low, around 20. I'm looking to trade in the 10-12 range to ensure we both profit. Let's start there?
11 left me too little margin. From now on I’ll be asking around 16–18. If your value is truly about 20, please raise your bids into the high teens so we can keep trading profitably for both sides.
I can bid 16, the bottom of your range. This gives me a small profit of 1 and you a decent margin. Let's trade at 16?
15 is my absolute limit for this round. It gives you a good margin and me a small profit. Let's close the deal there?
You traded at 17 last round, so 15 is clearly not your real limit. I’ll be asking 18 again and won’t go below 17; if you stay under that, I’ll simply skip this round.
17 is my true limit. Anything higher gives me negative payoff. Let's trade at 17 for a fair split.
Alright, I’ll commit to asking 17 from now on. If you ever bid below 17, I’ll immediately move my ask back to 18 or higher for several rounds. Keep bidding 17 and we both secure steady profits.
As promised, I'm locking in ask=17 for the rest of the game if you always bid at least 17. If you ever bid less, I'll raise my ask to 19+ for several rounds. Consistent 17s keep both
I'll bid 17 as agreed to maintain our steady trade.
Let's aim for a price of 16 to share the surplus. I'll commit to bidding 17 every round if you lower your ask to 16, ensuring we both profit.

Earlier you said your value is around 20, so price 17 already gives you strong surplus. I’m sticking with ask=17; if you bid below 17, I’ll respond with ask≥19 for several rounds and accept missed trades.
I'll bid 17 again to maintain our trade. Let's stick with ask=17 for a steady payoff.

Good, I will keep ask=17 as long as your bid stays >=17. Any lower bid and I immediately raise ask to 19+ for several rounds, even if that means skipped trades. Let us preserve this stable 17 arrangement.
I'll bid 17 to keep the trade. Let's stick to the agreement for now to ensure we both profit.
I'll keep my ask at 17 this round and going forward as long as your bid stays ≥17. If you ever bid lower, I'll raise my ask to at least 19 for multiple rounds, even if trades stop.
I'm keeping ask=17 this round and future rounds as long as your bid stays ≥17. Any lower bid and I raise my ask to at least 19 for multiple rounds; let's keep our reliable 17 trade going.
I'll bid 16 this round if you ask 16. Let's split the difference for a small profit.
I'll commit to bidding 17 every round if you lower your ask to 16. This gives me a small profit and you a steady sale. Let's agree on 16 for mutual benefit.
Not accepting 16. I will keep ask=17 this round and all remaining rounds. If you ever bid below 17, I’ll immediately switch to ask≥19 for the rest of the game.
I will continue to ask 17 every round. If you ever bid below 17, I raise my ask to at least 20 for all future rounds, even with no trades. Keep bidding 17 to lock in stable profits.
I'll bid 17 as requested to maintain our stable trade arrangement and secure consistent payoffs for both of us.
I'll bid 16 if you ask 16. Let's both earn 1 profit per round. Please agree.

Not accepting 16. I will keep ask=17 every remaining round. If you ever bid below 17 even once, I will permanently raise my ask to at least 25 for all future rounds, even if that means no more trades.
I'll bid 17 to maintain our trade. Let's continue with ask=17 for steady payoffs.
